stories.title: Follow along in ESPN's Draftcast: Analysis for every pick
stories.summary: Get pick by pick results from each round of the 2026 NFL Draft with Draftcast on ESPN

stories.title: Follow live: 76ers host Celtics in pivotal Game 3
stories.summary: Live coverage of the Boston Celtics vs. Philadelphia 76ers NBA game on ESPN, including live score, highlights and updated stats.

stories.title: Snead touts McVay 'lockstep' after tense presser
stories.summary: Rams general manager Les Snead said Friday that he and coach Sean McVay are "in lockstep" on decisions they make in the draft.

stories.title: Durant (ankle) out Game 3 with Rockets down 0-2
stories.summary: Rockets star Kevin Durant won't play in Game 3 of Houston's first-round playoff series against the Lakers on Friday night because of a sprained left ankle.

stories.title: Packers, Reed agree to 3-year, $50M extension
stories.summary: The Packers and receiver Jayden Reed have agreed to a three-year, $50 million contract extension that includes $20 million in guaranteed money.
